시편 145:1.content: I will exalt you, my God, the King. I will praise your name forever and ever.

시편 145:2.content: Every day I will praise you. I will extol your name forever and ever.

시편 145:3.content: Great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised! His greatness is unsearchable.

시편 145:4.content: One generation will commend your works to another, and will declare your mighty acts.

시편 145:5.content: I will meditate on the glorious majesty of your honor, on your wondrous works.

시편 145:6.content: Men will speak of the might of your awesome acts. I will declare your greatness.

시편 145:7.content: They will utter the memory of your great goodness, and will sing of your righteousness.

시편 145:8.content: Yahweh is gracious, merciful, slow to anger, and of great loving kindness.

시편 145:9.content: Yahweh is good to all. His tender mercies are over all his works.

시편 145:10.content: All your works will give thanks to you, Yahweh. Your saints will extol you.

시편 145:11.content: They will speak of the glory of your kingdom, and talk about your power,

시편 145:12.content: to make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, the glory of the majesty of his kingdom.

시편 145:13.content: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom. Your dominion endures throughout all generations. Yahweh is faithful in all his words, and loving in all his deeds.

시편 145:14.content: Yahweh upholds all who fall, and raises up all those who are bowed down.

시편 145:15.content: The eyes of all wait for you. You give them their food in due season.

시편 145:16.content: You open your hand, and satisfy the desire of every living thing.

시편 145:17.content: Yahweh is righteous in all his ways, and gracious in all his works.

시편 145:18.content: Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.

시편 145:19.content: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear him. He also will hear their cry, and will save them.

시편 145:20.content: Yahweh preserves all those who love him, but he will destroy all the wicked.

시편 145:21.content: My mouth will speak the praise of Yahweh. Let all flesh bless his holy name forever and ever.
